body_excerpt: In unix_stream_recv_urg of af_unix.c, there is a possible way to achieve code execution due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In unix_stream_recv_urg of af_unix.c, there is a possible way to achieve code execution due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privilege
